criteria.reason: Current App.tsx still cycles panels in visual order with Ctrl+Alt+ArrowLeft/ArrowRight and requests inner-content focus for browser, editor, files, and terminal panels.
Current focus routing targets the browser URL input, Monaco editor focus bridge, xterm focus bridge, and the first visible file-tree item, with targeted Playwright coverage passing.
Current file-tree keyboard handlers implement ArrowUp/Down/Left/Right and Enter behavior, and Enter-driven file opens request editor focus while the targeted Playwright scenario passes.
Current key handling binds Ctrl+Alt+V to close only the actually focused workspace panel and the close path still falls through to next, previous, or none as specified.
Ctrl+Alt+T still opens the panel dialog, required selectors remain present, and current typecheck/build/targeted Playwright verification all pass without needing task-specific backend behavior.

commands_run.command: npm run test:e2e -- --grep "panel keyboard focus routing, file tree keys, and Ctrl\+Alt\+V close work"
